subtasks.description: Retrieve all active billing contracts with contracted annual value and key identifiers from contract management system
Query invoices issued in 2024, aggregated by contract ID to compute total invoiced amounts

Reconcile contracted annual values against 2024 actual invoices, calculate variance percentage, and flag contracts with >10% variance (both positive and negative). Classify variance severity and provide reconciliation summary.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks are necessary: (1) retrieve active contracts from the contract system (mongo_query, small—straightforward filtering by status), (2) aggregate 2024 invoices by contract (sql_gen, small—single aggregation query on invoice table), (3) reconcile the two sources, compute variance, and flag exceptions (cross_recon, mid—requires matching contracts to invoices, variance calculation logic, and classification of material differences). The cross_recon tier is mid because it involves two-source reconciliation with threshold-based classification; both upstream tasks are simple, so no complexity boost is needed.

output.sql: SELECT contract_id, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_invoiced_2024 FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY contract_id

output.note: No actual contract or invoice records were provided in upstream_outputs; only query/pipeline definitions were supplied. Reconciliation requires executed result sets.
